name: CUPS & LIDS
description: Custom-printed PET and PP cups for milk tea, coffee, and cold beverages. High-resolution flexo printing.

name: PAPER BAGS
description: Kraft and coated paper bags with full-bleed printing. Ideal for café takeaway and retail packaging.

name: STICKER LABELS
description: Waterproof vinyl and matte sticker labels. Precision die-cut with CMYK + spot UV options.

name: SEALING FILM
description: Cup sealing film rolls with custom artwork. Compatible with standard sealing machines.
